# starburst_resource

## Purpose

Starburst (Trino's commercial distribution) connection resource — alias for `trino_resource`. Same engine, same wire protocol; registered separately for vendor discoverability.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->
<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.StarburstResourceComponent
attributes:
  resource_key: starburst_resource
  host: my-cluster.galaxy.starburst.io
  port: 443
  user: my-user@example.com
  catalog: tpch
  schema_name: sf1
  password_env_var: STARBURST_PASSWORD
```

## Validation level

**code** — see the matching `vendors/<name>.md` page for live demo status.
